name: tick-coord
summary: Multi-agent task coordination via Git-backed Markdown (tick-md)
description: Coordinate work across avatars and agents using the Tick protocol. Maintain structured task tracking in TICK.md files with full Git audit trails. Supports multi-avatar OpenClaw deployments with handoff protocols, dependency tracking, and agent identity management.
author: Frutero Club

requirements.notes: tick CLI must be built and linked from ~/clawd/projects/tick-md/cli
